legal_notice.title: VERITAS Community Report — Sovereign Trace Seal
content: This report was submitted through VERITAS, the Community Damage Certification Platform.
**The seal proves:** This report existed at this exact moment, in this exact form,
before any responder action, before any resource deployment decision.
- GPS coordinates (anonymized or precise per reporter choice)
- Photo hash (not the image itself, for privacy)
- Reporter identity (VERITAS is anonymous by design)
This seal is permanent and immutable. The report cannot be altered after sealing.
The ledger is the witness. The timestamp is the truth.

fields.label: Report UUID
fields.description: Unique identifier for this VERITAS report.

fields.label: Damage Classification
fields.placeholder: Minimal / No damage | Partially damaged | Completely damaged

fields.label: Infrastructure Type
fields.placeholder: Residential / Road / Bridge / Medical / School / etc.

fields.label: Infrastructure Name (Optional)
fields.description: Specific name of the damaged infrastructure.

fields.label: GPS Coordinates
fields.description: Latitude and longitude of the damage location.

fields.label: Uncertainty Mass (UM)
fields.description: How much uncertainty is in the DCI score.

fields.label: Photo SHA-256 Hash
fields.description: Cryptographic hash of the damage photo (not the image itself).

fields.label: Pressing Needs
fields.description: Most urgent needs identified by the reporter.
fields.placeholder: Food assistance, medical care, shelter, etc.

fields.label: Declaration
options: I affirm this report was submitted in good faith and accurately represents observed damage.
I understand this seal is permanent and immutable.
I understand the photo hash is recorded but the image itself is not stored in the STP ledger for privacy.

steps: Report sealed — Permanent entry in the Sovereign Trace ledger.
Linked to VERITAS report UUID for cross-reference.
Notification — Report UUID and seal hash provided to reporter.
Responder access — Sealed report visible in VERITAS responder dashboard.
after_submit.footer:
The report is sealed. The ledger is the witness.

VERITAS | Sovereign Trace Protocol | Sheldon K. Salmon | aionsystem2026@gmail.com
